resources.string: Informational only — not used for auto-login. Stored on this device in the launcher list (plaintext). Do not store secrets you cannot afford to lose.
Tap a slot to edit. Delete removes it.
This is the debug screen. However this text will dissapear when data arrives from the server.

--- New Features:
*SD Card Permissions are now asked for.
*Support fixes for newer android versions.
*Fixed crash when touching the top of the window.
---- TEST VERSION 7 ----\n*Many bug fixes. Stay tuned for the switch over to the play store beta system.
To access files that will not be not be removed when this app is uninstalled, grant permission to access external storage.
BlowTorch needs storage access to import and export profiles from /BlowTorch/ on your device. Network access (INTERNET) is granted at install time.
Storage: %1$s. Internet access is enabled at install; restrict it in system app settings if needed.
Found %1$d profile(s) in app storage and added to the list.
Permission denied for %1$s. Tap Try again or open App settings.
%1$s needs permissions you denied. Open App settings to allow storage, notifications, or network access.
SDCard public access granted, external writes will happen to\nSDCard%1$s
SDCard public access denied, external writes will happen to\nSDCard%1$s\nThe folder will be removed when this app is uninstalled.
Attempting to load files from:\nSDCard%1$s\nThis folder will be removed when the application is uninstalled.
Rozłączono z: %1$s · Dotknij, aby połączyć ponownie
